category_sources: source_facts.description says rapid note management for the terminal; official README calls Jot a feature-stripped version of Obsidian focused on rapid note management through the terminal.
display_name_sources: Official repository README heading is jot; source_facts.name is jot.
docs_sources: Official repository README is the primary documentation surface and includes installation, usage, notes, changelog, build, and dependencies sections.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has official repository https://github.com/shashwatah/jot; per instruction, repo returned as null and not second-guessed.
tags_sources: Official README says notes are Markdown files in local vault folders and provides terminal command examples.
